response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and open-source experience, the candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems experience critical for this role; their C++ exposure is limited to academic/early-career projects, and their recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or mentoring in cloud/DevOps contexts.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring experience
Broad full-stack expertise across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to lead ambiguous projects and build developer tooling
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience, far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No proven track record in cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or infrastructure scaling
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
